name: Shiranui Style Samsara
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>廻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ね</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
This card's name becomes "Shiranui Style Synthesis" while it is in the Spell & Trap Zone. Once per turn: You can activate 1 of these effects.
● Banish 1 face-up Zombie-Type monster you control; you take no damage this turn (even if this card leaves the field).
● Target 2 of your banished Zombie-Type monsters with 0 DEF; shuffle them both into the Deck, then draw 1 card.
eff:

● Target 2 of your banished Zombie-Type monsters with 0 DEF; shuffle them both into the Deck, then draw 1 card.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
stat_change: Changes own name while on the field
